terms.definition: Service providing current route params, queryParams, data, and URL segments to routed components.
Ahead-of-Time compilation. Angular compiles templates at build time, not runtime. Default since Angular 9.
Template pipe that subscribes to an Observable or Promise, auto-unsubscribes on destroy, and triggers change detection.
RxJS Subject that requires an initial value and replays the latest value to every new subscriber.
Route guard that runs before navigation. Returns boolean or UrlTree to allow or redirect.
Mechanism Angular uses to track data changes and update the DOM. Default uses Zone.js; OnPush reduces checks.
Main building block. Class decorated with @Component containing template, styles, and logic.
Queries projected content (ng-content slots) of a component. Available after ngAfterContentInit.
TypeScript annotation (@Component, @Injectable, @Input, @Output) that attaches metadata to a class or member.
Angular 17+ template block for lazy-rendering parts of the template on viewport, idle, or interaction triggers.
Dependency Injection. Angular's hierarchical IoC system for providing and sharing services.
Class that modifies DOM behavior. Structural directives (*ngFor, *ngIf) or attribute directives ([ngClass]).
Angular Signals side-effect that re-runs whenever the signals it reads change.
Reactive Forms primitive tracking a single input's value, validation state, and dirty/touched flags.
Function controlling route access. canActivate, canDeactivate, canMatch, canActivateChild.
Angular service for HTTP requests. Returns Observables. Configure interceptors via provideHttpClient().
Decorator marking a class as providable via Angular's DI system. providedIn: 'root' creates a singleton.
HttpInterceptorFn that intercepts requests and responses for auth headers, logging, or error handling.
Type-safe DI token for providing non-class values (config objects, primitives, factory functions).
Load feature components or routes on demand via loadComponent or loadChildren. Reduces initial bundle.
Decorator grouping components, directives, and pipes. Being superseded by standalone components in Angular 17+.
RxJS lazy push stream. Core async primitive in Angular for HTTP, Router events, and reactive forms.
Change detection strategy that skips checks unless an @Input reference changes or an async pipe emits.
Transforms template display values. Built-in: date, currency, async. Custom pipes implement PipeTransform.
Pre-fetches route data before navigation completes. Data injected via ActivatedRoute.
Reactive Extensions for JavaScript. Provides Observables, operators (map, switchMap), and Subjects.
Angular 16+ reactive primitive. signal() holds state; computed() derives state; effect() runs side effects.
Component, directive, or pipe declared without NgModule. Imports dependencies directly. Default in Angular 17+.
RxJS multicast Observable. Push values to all subscribers manually. No initial value (use BehaviorSubject for that).
RxJS operator that cancels the previous inner observable on new emission. Used for typeahead and search.
Function for *ngFor that returns a stable identity per item, preventing full DOM re-render on list mutation.
Queries elements or child components from the component's own template. Available after ngAfterViewInit.
Monkey-patches async APIs to notify Angular when to run change detection. Angular 17+ can run zoneless.
